micromap.description: Index into the root-level KHR_mesh_opacity_micromap.micromaps array.
micromap.gltf_detailedDescription: References the micromap build data used when attaching opacity micromaps to this primitive's triangles.

micromapIndices.description: Accessor index for per-geometry-triangle micromap lookup values.
micromapIndices.gltf_detailedDescription: Optional accessor with one scalar per geometry triangle. If omitted, geometry triangle t maps to micromap triangle t plus micromapBaseTriangle. Values are either special indices (-1 through -4) or non-negative micromap triangle indices. When provided, the accessor count must equal the primitive triangle count.

micromapBaseTriangle.description: Offset added to non-special micromap indices before lookup.
micromapBaseTriangle.gltf_detailedDescription: Added to each non-special lookup value before indexing into the micromap triangles array. Defaults to 0.
